title: Here’s what Samsung announced at Galaxy Unpacked 2026 — from a new foldable form factor to its first pair of smart glasses
summary: As well as phones, Samsung has also announced the Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 and the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 , and it’s the latter of these that’s the most exciting.
